title: pyrethrum segetum
intro: Pyrethrum segetum, also known as wild pyrethrum or wild chamomile, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum segetum lie in its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, as well as its application in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum segetum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to calm the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
